info.title: Paperboat Server API
info.description: Production control-plane HTTP API for Paperboat dashboard and CLI clients.

bearerRefresh.description: Rotating refresh token accepted only by the refresh endpoint.

bearerEdgeControl.description: Private edge-control service credential. Never exposed to browser or CLI clients.

bearerHelperIdentity.description: Short-lived helper identity credential bound to the helper Ed25519 key.

bearerPreviewRegistration.description: Five-minute preview_registration credential bound to one helper and environment.

version.description: Current project version. Required when If-Match is not supplied.

post.summary: Fetch desired routes for tunnel node

post.description: Consumes an environment/helper-bound identity and Ed25519 proof over the exact request body. Exact operation replays return the encrypted recorded decision.

200.description: Connector admission credential, assigned endpoint, and route handoffs.

post.description: Requires a still-valid helper identity and an Ed25519 proof over the exact operation request. Exact operation replays return the same encrypted-at-rest result.

post.summary: Report a retryable connected-machine installation failure
post.description: Requires the active helper identity and an Ed25519 proof over the exact request. Transitions only the matching installing or connecting enrollment to failed_retryable.
Private helper identity and proof endpoint. Returns a short-lived credential bound to the active assignment and warning revision.
Private edge-control endpoint. Stale revision, node, or connector generation observations are rejected.

get.description: Private edge-control endpoint consumed by tunnel trust refresh.

get.summary: Authorize TLS for an active preview route
Authorize TLS for an active control route

post.summary: Issue a short-lived helper preview registration credential
post.description: Requires the durable helper identity and signed proof over the exact bounded request body. Returns a five-minute preview_registration credential bound to the helper and environment; the credential is intended for helper memory only.

schema.description: Unpadded base64url helper-proof envelope over the exact request body.

post.summary: Execute an authenticated helper preview operation
post.description: Helper-only endpoint. The preview registration bearer, separate helper identity, and signed proof bind the operation to one helper and its assigned environment. Supports list, register, and remove; preview bytes never traverse the control plane.

schema.description: Durable helper identity credential used only to verify the helper proof and bindings.
Unpadded base64url helper-proof envelope over the exact request body.

post.description: Accepts an ordered helper-signed target observation using a preview registration bearer and separate helper identity. Delayed or cross-environment observations cannot overwrite current readiness.

schema.description: Durable helper identity credential used only to verify the helper proof and bindings.

get.summary: List the user's active public previews
get.description: Returns active previews with project or machine and owner context. Preview creation is available only to in-environment agents through paperboat-helper.

200.description: Owned active public previews and readiness states.

delete.description: The public route is detached and the identity remains tombstoned for the retention period. This endpoint cannot create previews.

post.summary: Requeue an uncertain billing operation after provider evidence confirms no mutation
post.description: Admin-only, CSRF-protected and idempotent. Supported kinds are checkout, portal, subscription_update, and auto_topup. The evidence reference is hashed before persistence or audit.

204.description: Uncertain operation moved to its existing retryable failed state.

post.summary: Recover an uncertain hosted secret deletion

get.description: Cookie authentication requires no bearer scope. Bearer authentication requires account:read.

200.description: Repository, policy, and per-machine sync status.

post.summary: Export age recovery identity after purpose-bound reauthentication
Create a CLI device authorization grant

200.description: Device grant consumed and token set issued.

get.summary: Read a pending CLI device request

post.description: Logs out only the CLI client-session family identified by the bearer credential.

200.description: Client session revoked or already revoked.

get.description: Cookie authentication requires no bearer scope. Bearer authentication requires account:read.

delete.description: Cookie authentication requires CSRF. Bearer authentication requires clients:revoke.

get.summary: Create a WorkOS OAuth state token

post.description: Revokes the current WorkOS-backed browser session and active downstream access sessions. Independent CLI client sessions remain active.

get.summary: Read CSRF token for browser writes
Preview recurring storage price and effective date

post.summary: Create a Polar customer portal session

get.summary: Complete GitHub OAuth from browser redirect

get.description: Cookie authentication requires no bearer scope. Bearer authentication requires account:read.
Cookie authentication requires no bearer scope. Bearer authentication requires projects:read.

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: Project version, optionally quoted or prefixed with project-version-.

post.description: Bearer authentication requires projects:connect. The optional body selects a terminal_session_id; omission selects default.

202.description: Project is starting; no credentials are returned.

parameters.name: terminal_session_id
parameters.description: Selected terminal session ID; omission selects default.

get.description: Bearer authentication requires projects:connect. The optional terminal_session_id retains the selected CLI terminal session through readiness polling.

201.description: Enrollment operation and one-time bootstrap handoff.

post.summary: Retry connected-machine enrollment with a new generation

post.description: The optional body selects a terminal_session_id; omission selects default.

parameters.name: terminal_session_id
parameters.description: Selected terminal session ID; omission selects default.

post.description: Authenticated with the owning project-machine credential. File contents and absolute paths are not accepted.
Authenticated with the project-machine bearer credential. Config sync summaries are sanitized and retained up to the configured server limit.
